## Type

- [ ] New journal entry / content
- [ ] Site improvement (UX, navigation, styling)
- [ ] Maintenance / hygiene
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] Site stays static and dependency-free (no frameworks, no external scripts)
- [ ] Tested locally (`cd docs && python3 -m http.server 3000`)
- [ ] Internal links and any new `site.js` routes resolve
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md / VERSION updated if this is a release
- [ ] No secrets or private notes
